auth.login_intro: Track your monthly reports, goals, and tasks.
auth.register_intro: Your account will be available after admin approval.
auth.pending_message: Your account is waiting for admin approval before access is granted.

dashboard.empty_leaderboard: No leaderboard data available for the selected year.

logs.reports_hint: Submit one report per month. Existing entries can be edited.
logs.goals_hint: Track annual goals with progress, priority, and approval status.
logs.tasks_hint: Track short-term tasks and update progress over time.
logs.empty_reports: No reports have been submitted yet.

users.management_hint: Create staff/admin users and manage activation, approval, and passwords.
users.edit_hint: Update profile details, language preference, and workflow toggles.
users.settings_hint: Configure defaults that affect department-wide behavior.

export.title: Export
export.staff_hint: Download your reports, goals, and tasks for the selected year.
export.admin_hint: Download team summary exports for executive reporting.

motivation.near_target: Almost there! You are close to this month's target.
motivation.above_target: Outstanding work! You are above your target.
motivation.below_target: You've got this! Keep going and close the gap.

achievement.first_report: Welcome aboard! Your first report is in.
achievement.all_goals_completed: All goals complete. Great work this year!
